changelog: Fixed: Theme persistence bug — saved accent color is now reapplied to all 5 :root CSS custom properties immediately on boot, so cold-start / force-quit-reopen always shows the user's saved theme
Fixed: ColorPicker swatch + HEX input row alignment — items-center + gap-3 gives perfectly centred vertical alignment and uniform spacing

Added: Smart deriveCustomPalette — HSL-based derivation guarantees muted/surface/glow/shadow tokens never fall below 7 % lightness in dark mode and never exceed 97 % in light mode; absolute min-contrast tokens fitted from a single accent hex instead of raw RGB subtraction
Added: System / Light / Dark mode switcher — themeMode state (light|dark|system) saved to localStorage with live body-class toggle and matchMedia listener for the 'system' path
Added: 5 preset theme rows (Default, Ocean, Sunset, Emerald, Violet) in themeIdentity.ts with strict Object.freeze; new ThemeModeToggle component cycles through System → Dark → Light
Refactored: themeController.ts — single write-path CSS var writer; themeIdentity.ts cycle-free (types + presets only); ColorPicker.tsx direct document.documentElement writes
Added: initTheme() static pre-commit in App.tsx — reads localStorage, derives tokens, writes all 7 :root inline styles before React paints
Added: applyAccent / applyModeTokens split in themeController — accent and mode tokens always go to WRITE_THEME_TOKENS and DARK_TOKENS / LIGHT_TOKENS respectively so no key clobbering ever occurs
Fix: ColorPicker.tsx now applies ThemePalette across all 5 bg-based accent tokens; deriveCustomPalette uses HSL contrast-safe derivation in dark and light mode
Added: ThemeModeToggle.tsx (Sun / Moon / Monitor icons) wiring: adaptive system check in Monitor slot
Improved: index.css — body token overrides ensure complete light-dark layer separation on bootstrap
Fix: Preset surface swatches rendered against dark mode derivation (≥ 7 % L hard minimum) so no preset can ever display a barely-visible tinted background.
Fix: package.json and version.json kept in sync: 2.0.6 on both files
Fix: CapacitorUpdater version/exec guard — no more runtime crash on device
Fix: OTA polling loop removed; plugin runs once per app foreground
Fix: downloadProgressModal no longer stuck at 100%
Fix: Chart timestamp sort — metrics ordered oldest-to-newest reliably
Added: Chart period filter UI (day / week / month / 3 months)
Refactored: Dashboard widget cleanup and layout stabilisation
Fix: notifyAppReady fires once via useEffect dependency reset
Fix: version.json treated as single source of truth in OTA hook
